subcodes.first_line: O beloved handmaid of Bahá! The situation remaineth as before. The investigators are conducting their investigation with utmost diligence, and Mírzá Muḥammad-'Alí [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز بها احوال مثل سابقست مفتشها در نهایت تفتیش میرزا محمد علی و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
